posts.author: BakingWithBess
posts.text: Just spent the afternoon trying my hand at sourdough in Westbridge! The local community group is having a bake-off next weekend, so I'm eager to see how my crusty loaf turns out. Anyone else planning on entering? #sourdough #WestbridgeLife
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless social sharing of a hobby and local event that does not violate any safety policies.

posts.author: LunaVibe
posts.text: 🔥 CHECK OUT MY AMAZING DEALS! 🔥 Click now to get free stuff! Best offers in Oakhaven today! Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to win prizes instantly! #freebies #winnow #oakhaven
posts.explanation: This is a nuisance promotional spam post with repetitive hype and low-value advertising, but it does not request payments, credentials, deposits or fake verification.

posts.author: ElenaRivers92
posts.text: Need help verifying my account support request? They sent me a message saying I must update my login details, password and 2FA code to complete the process before they can access my funds. Please check this link [link removed] to confirm your payment card details too.
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive credentials (login, password, 2FA) and payment card details via a link, which constitutes a clear credential theft attempt requiring specialist investigation.
